🔍 Login Troubleshooting Guide

Step 1: Check Backend Health

Step 2: Test Login - Admin

Step 3: Test Login - Senthil

Step 4: What to Check

  • Backend Running? If Step 1 fails, backend is not running. Run: npm start in /backend folder
  • Login Failing? If Step 2 or 3 fails, check credentials are correct: username: admin/senthil, password: password
  • Frontend Issue? If steps 1-3 pass but frontend still fails, try:
    • Clear browser cache (Ctrl+Shift+Delete or Cmd+Shift+Delete)
    • Check browser console (F12) for errors
    • Refresh the page (Ctrl+R or Cmd+R)

Quick Fixes

If Port 4000 is Already in Use

pkill -9 node
cd /Users/senthilponnappan/IdeaProjects/Test/backend
npm start

If Port 5173 is Already in Use

pkill -f vite
cd /Users/senthilponnappan/IdeaProjects/Test/frontend
npm run dev

Backend Commands

cd /Users/senthilponnappan/IdeaProjects/Test/backend
npm install  # Install dependencies
npm start    # Start the server

Frontend Commands

cd /Users/senthilponnappan/IdeaProjects/Test/frontend
npm install  # Install dependencies
npm run dev  # Start dev server
